title: Flame Grilled Turkish Lamb Cig Kofte
description: A malty and light Turkish dish featuring wholegrain mustard and flambe, perfect for a hangover cure, made with ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients in a cig kofte form, served in a ceramic tagine.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
Mix the lamb mince, wholegrain mustard, olive oil, onion, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl until just combined.
Divide the mixture into 8 equal portions and shape each portion into a cigar shaped kofte.
Thread the kofte onto metal skewers, leaving a small space between each kofte.
Grill the kofte for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Flambe the kofte with a little bit of oil and serve in a ceramic tagine.
Garnish with parsley and serve immediately.
Serve with a side of crusty bread or over rice.
